title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXV. Jingles.
content:
Rompty-iddity, row, row, row,
        If I had a good supper, I could eat it now.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXV. Jingles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
